channel.title: My Routine
channel.description: My Routine is an interactive fitness website designed to help you build structure, stay motivated, and track your personal fitness goals. The platform supports both beginners and more experienced users in creating and maintaining an effective workout routine.

item.title: Training
item.description: The training page provides a variety of exercises and routines to help you build strength and improve your fitness.

item.title: Push
item.description: On the push page you can select the exercises you want to include in your push workout routine. This workout focuses on exercises that target the chest, shoulders, and triceps. You can customize your routine to fit your fitness goals and preferences.

item.title: Pull
item.description: On the pull page you can select the exercises you want to include in your pull workout routine. This workout focuses on exercises that target the back, and biceps. You can customize your routine to fit your fitness goals and preferences.

item.title: Legs
item.description: On the legs page you can select the exercises you want to include in your leg workout routine. This workout focuses on exercises that target the legs and abs. You can customize your routine to fit your fitness goals and preferences.

item.title: Planner
item.description: The planner page can be used to plan and organize your workouts for optimal results.

item.title: Progress
item.description: The progress page allows you to monitor your fitness journey and celebrate your achievements.
